{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant – Sales & Marketing Operations",
  "description": "Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited - We are an innovative, indigenous food manufacturing and packaging company proudly rooted in Nigeria. Our mission is to bridge the gap between Nigeria&rsquo;s rich and diverse indigenous soups and the often substandard quality of existing swallow products in the market. We believe that our swallows should serve as the perfect complement&mdash;indeed, a rallying point&mdash;for our traditional soups, enhancing both taste and nutritional value.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant &ndash; Sales &amp; Marketing Operations

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Group Executive Assistant (Group EA)

About the Role


	We are seeking a highly organized, commercially aware, proactive, and execution-driven professional for the role of Executive Assistant &ndash; Sales &amp; Marketing Operations.
	This role provides strategic, operational, administrative, and coordination support to the Group EA in overseeing nationwide sales, marketing, trade operations, reporting structures, field execution, performance monitoring, and operational communication across the Company&rsquo;s expanding FMCG network.
	The ideal candidate must possess strong organizational capability, operational coordination skills, commercial awareness, reporting discipline, and the ability to function effectively within a fast-paced, high-performance sales and marketing environment.
	This is a highly sensitive and demanding operational coordination role requiring discretion, responsiveness, accountability, structure, and excellent follow-through capabilities.


Job Summary


	The Assistant EA &ndash; Sales &amp; Marketing Operations will support the coordination and monitoring of sales operations, field reporting, marketing execution, trade activities, business communication, operational documentation, and performance tracking across multiple regions and sales structures within the Company.
	The role involves close interaction with Traditional Trade teams, Modern Trade operations, Territory Sales Directors (TSDs), Key Account Executives, Trade Marketing personnel, distributors, retail channels, and support teams to ensure operational alignment, reporting accuracy, communication efficiency, and timely execution of commercial objectives.
	The role may occasionally require official travel and direct involvement in operational meetings, activations, reviews, and strategic coordination initiatives.


Core Responsibilities
Executive &amp; Operational Coordination:


	Provide day-to-day operational and administrative support to the Group EA on sales and marketing activities.
	Coordinate internal communication between field sales teams, trade teams, marketing personnel, and Management.
	Track execution of directives, action points, operational assignments, and sales initiatives across locations.
	Support scheduling, coordination, and documentation of sales and operational meetings.
	Assist in monitoring performance deliverables across departments and field structures.


Sales Operations Support:


	Monitor daily sales reports, field updates, stock movement reports, and territory performance submissions.
	Support coordination of nationwide sales activities involving TSDs, Sales Representatives, Key Account Executives, and Trade teams.
	Follow up on pending operational issues, distributor concerns, route execution gaps, and market feedback.
	Support implementation and monitoring of sales operational structures and reporting systems.
	Assist in tracking target achievement, sales performance trends, and operational execution compliance.


Marketing &amp; Trade Coordination:


	Support coordination of trade marketing campaigns, activations, promotional activities, and visibility initiatives.
	Assist with planning and execution tracking for market activations and regional campaigns.
	Coordinate communication and logistics support for sales and marketing initiatives.
	Monitor visibility materials, campaign deployment, and execution timelines across locations.
	Support the organization of strategic market engagement and business development activities.


Reporting &amp; Data Management:


	Prepare operational summaries, sales reports, meeting minutes, dashboards, and executive updates.
	Maintain organized records of operational reports, field communication, trade activities, and performance documentation.
	Assist with collation and analysis of sales, stock, and operational performance data.
	Ensure timely submission and proper filing of reports from field and operational teams.
	Support development of structured reporting templates and operational trackers.


Communication &amp; Stakeholder Engagement:


	Maintain professional communication with internal and external stakeholders.
	Support coordination between Management, sales teams, distributors, retail partners, and operational personnel.
	Ensure proper escalation and follow-up on operational concerns requiring Management attention.
	Draft operational correspondence, memos, presentations, and internal communication where required.


Process Monitoring &amp; Compliance:


	Support adherence to operational procedures, reporting timelines, and execution standards.
	Monitor compliance with communication structures and operational reporting expectations.
	Identify coordination gaps and recommend process improvement initiatives.
	Support operational accountability and documentation processes within the sales and marketing structure.


Key Reporting &amp; Operational Interface
The role will work closely with:


	Group EA
	Sales Operations Manager
	Traditional Trade Executives
	Modern Trade Executives
	Trade Marketing &amp; B2B Teams
	Territory Sales Directors (TSDs)
	Sales Representatives (SRs)
	Sales Data Analyst
	Logistics &amp; Warehouse Teams
	Customer Engagement Teams


Requirements
Educational Qualification and Experience:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, Management, Economics, Mass Communication, or related discipline.
	5&ndash; 7years of relevant experience in Executive Support, Sales Operations Coordination, Commercial Operations, or Administrative Support within an FMCG or fast-paced operational environment.
	Relevant certifications in administration, operations, or project coordination are an added advantage.+
	Experience supporting multi-location operations and field teams is an added advantage.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong organizational and coordination skills.
	Excellent communication and follow-up capability.
	Strong reporting and documentation discipline.
	Ability to multitask and manage operational priorities effectively.
	Commercial awareness and understanding of FMCG operational structures.
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, particularly Excel, Word, and PowerPoint.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism.
	Strong attention to detail and execution capability.


Personal Attributes:


	Highly proactive and responsive.
	Structured and detail-oriented.
	Strong sense of accountability and professionalism.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Solution-driven with strong interpersonal skills.
	Disciplined, adaptable, and operationally minded.


What Success Looks Like:


	Timely and accurate operational coordination.
	Improved reporting compliance across field teams.
	Effective execution follow-up and communication flow.
	Organized documentation and operational tracking systems.
	Strong support for nationwide sales and marketing execution.
	Enhanced operational efficiency and responsiveness within the commercial structure.


Salary
N650,000 - N800,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter CV to: recruitment@elkrisgroup.org using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-28",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-26",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited"

Executive Assistant – Sales & Marketing Operations Job at Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited - We are an innovative, indigenous food manufacturing and packaging company proudly rooted in Nigeria. Our mission is to bridge the gap between Nigeria’s rich and diverse indigenous soups and the often substandard quality of existing swallow products in the market. We believe that our swallows should serve as the perfect complement—indeed, a rallying point—for our traditional soups, enhancing both taste and nutritional value.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant – Sales & Marketing Operations

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Group Executive Assistant (Group EA)
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



About the Role

	This role provides strategic, operational, administrative, and coordination support to the Group EA in overseeing nationwide sales, marketing, trade operations, reporting structures, field execution, performance monitoring, and operational communication across the Company’s expanding FMCG network.
	The ideal candidate must possess strong organizational capability, operational coordination skills, commercial awareness, reporting discipline, and the ability to function effectively within a fast-paced, high-performance sales and marketing environment.
	This is a highly sensitive and demanding operational coordination role requiring discretion, responsiveness, accountability, structure, and excellent follow-through capabilities.

	Trade Marketing & B2B Teams

	Sales Representatives (SRs)

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Lead Digital Marketing Strategist",
  "description": "Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited - We are an innovative, indigenous food manufacturing and packaging company proudly rooted in Nigeria. Our mission is to bridge the gap between Nigeria&rsquo;s rich and diverse indigenous soups and the often substandard quality of existing swallow products in the market. We believe that our swallows should serve as the perfect complement&mdash;indeed, a rallying point&mdash;for our traditional soups, enhancing both taste and nutritional value.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Lead Digital Marketing Strategist

Job Location: Amac, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Group EA

About the Role


	Elkris Bio-Health Foods Nigeria Limited is seeking a highly creative, commercially driven, and performance-oriented Lead Digital Marketing Strategist to drive the Company&rsquo;s digital growth, brand visibility, online engagement, customer acquisition, and digital sales presence across Nigeria.
	This role requires a strategic thinker with strong practical execution capabilities across digital marketing, social media growth, performance campaigns, online community engagement, content strategy, digital brand positioning, and customer conversion initiatives.
	The ideal candidate must understand the Nigerian digital consumer landscape, possess strong storytelling and audience engagement capabilities, and demonstrate the ability to execute high-impact, cost-effective digital campaigns that deliver measurable business growth and brand visibility.
	This is a high-responsibility role requiring innovation, speed, accountability, and strong operational coordination across multiple digital platforms and campaigns.


Core Responsibilities
Digital Brand Strategy &amp; Visibility:


	Lead and execute the Company&rsquo;s overall digital marketing and online brand visibility strategy.
	Drive strong and measurable brand presence across all significant digital and social media platforms.
	Develop and implement innovative digital campaigns to increase customer engagement, brand awareness, and online reach.
	Ensure consistent brand messaging, visual identity, and audience positioning across all digital channels.


Social Media &amp; Audience Engagement:


	Oversee daily management and growth of all Company social media platforms.
	Develop content calendars, campaign concepts, audience engagement initiatives, and digital storytelling strategies.
	Drive meaningful audience interaction, community growth, and customer engagement across platforms.
	Monitor social trends, audience behavior, and competitor digital activities to improve market positioning.


Digital Campaigns &amp; Performance Marketing:


	Plan and execute paid and organic digital marketing campaigns.
	Optimize digital campaigns for engagement, lead generation, conversion, and sales performance.
	Monitor campaign performance metrics and implement improvements for higher ROI.
	Support online product promotions, activations, launches, and customer acquisition initiatives.


Content Development &amp; Creative Coordination:


	Coordinate development of high-quality digital content including graphics, videos, reels, promotional materials, and campaign assets.
	Work closely with creative teams, videographers, designers, and content creators where required.
	Ensure all digital content aligns with brand standards and commercial objectives.


Data Analytics &amp; Performance Reporting:


	Track and analyze digital performance metrics across platforms.
	Generate periodic reports on engagement, reach, conversions, traffic, audience growth, and campaign effectiveness.
	Translate analytics into actionable digital growth strategies and optimization recommendations.


Reputation Management &amp; Customer Experience:


	Monitor online brand perception and customer feedback across digital channels.
	Ensure timely and professional response to online inquiries, comments, and engagement opportunities.
	Support customer retention and loyalty initiatives through digital engagement strategies.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Collaborate with Sales, Customer Engagement, Operations, and Management teams to support business growth objectives.
	Support digital visibility for sales campaigns, market activations, distributor engagement, and product awareness initiatives.
	Coordinate digital support for Company events, launches, promotions, and strategic projects.


The Ideal Candidate
Education:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, Digital Media, or related field.
	Relevant certifications in Digital Marketing or Brand Strategy are an added advantage.


Experience:


	4&ndash;8years of relevant experience in Digital Marketing, Brand Marketing, Social Media Strategy, or related roles.
	Strong practical experience managing business digital platforms and executing measurable digital campaigns.
	Experience within FMCG, wellness, retail, or consumer-focused industries is an added advantage.


Technical &amp; Creative Competence:


	Strong understanding of social media management, digital advertising, audience engagement, and content marketing.
	Knowledge of Meta Ads, Google Ads, analytics tools, SEO fundamentals, and campaign optimization.
	Strong content direction, storytelling, and creative execution capability.
	Ability to execute high-impact campaigns within lean or cost-conscious budgets.


Personal Attributes:


	Highly creative and commercially aware.
	Strong communication and organizational skills.
	Results-driven with strong attention to detail.
	Ability to work in fast-paced operational environments.
	Self-motivated, proactive, and execution-focused.


Salary
N650,000 - N800,000 monthly.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief portfolio or summary of past digital campaigns handled to: michealani@zohomail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Lead Digital Marketing Strategist Job at Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Ekris Bio Health Foods Nigeria Limited - We are an innovative, indigenous food manufacturing and packaging company proudly rooted in Nigeria. Our mission is to bridge the gap between Nigeria’s rich and diverse indigenous soups and the often substandard quality of existing swallow products in the market. We believe that our swallows should serve as the perfect complement—indeed, a rallying point—for our traditional soups, enhancing both taste and nutritional value.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Lead Digital Marketing Strategist

Job Location: Amac, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting To: Group EA

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Elkris Bio-Health Foods Nigeria Limited is seeking a highly creative, commercially driven, and performance-oriented Lead Digital Marketing Strategist to drive the Company’s digital growth, brand visibility, online engagement, customer acquisition, and digital sales presence across Nigeria.
	This role requires a strategic thinker with strong practical execution capabilities across digital marketing, social media growth, performance campaigns, online community engagement, content strategy, digital brand positioning, and customer conversion initiatives.
	The ideal candidate must understand the Nigerian digital consumer landscape, possess strong storytelling and audience engagement capabilities, and demonstrate the ability to execute high-impact, cost-effective digital campaigns that deliver measurable business growth and brand visibility.
	This is a high-responsibility role requiring innovation, speed, accountability, and strong operational coordination across multiple digital platforms and campaigns.


Core Responsibilities
Digital Brand Strategy & Visibility:


	Lead and execute the Company’s overall digital marketing and online brand visibility strategy.
	Drive strong and measurable brand presence across all significant digital and social media platforms.
	Develop and implement innovative digital campaigns to increase customer engagement, brand awareness, and online reach.
	Ensure consistent brand messaging, visual identity, and audience positioning across all digital channels.


Social Media & Audience Engagement:


	Oversee daily management and growth of all Company social media platforms.
	Develop content calendars, campaign concepts, audience engagement initiatives, and digital storytelling strategies.
	Drive meaningful audience interaction, community growth, and customer engagement across platforms.
	Monitor social trends, audience behavior, and competitor digital activities to improve market positioning.


Digital Campaigns & Performance Marketing:


	Plan and execute paid and organic digital marketing campaigns.
	Optimize digital campaigns for engagement, lead generation, conversion, and sales performance.
	Monitor campaign performance metrics and implement improvements for higher ROI.
	Support online product promotions, activations, launches, and customer acquisition initiatives.


Content Development & Creative Coordination:


	Coordinate development of high-quality digital content including graphics, videos, reels, promotional materials, and campaign assets.
	Work closely with creative teams, videographers, designers, and content creators where required.
	Ensure all digital content aligns with brand standards and commercial objectives.


Data Analytics & Performance Reporting:


	Track and analyze digital performance metrics across platforms.
	Generate periodic reports on engagement, reach, conversions, traffic, audience growth, and campaign effectiveness.
	Translate analytics into actionable digital growth strategies and optimization recommendations.


Reputation Management & Customer Experience:


	Monitor online brand perception and customer feedback across digital channels.
	Ensure timely and professional response to online inquiries, comments, and engagement opportunities.
	Support customer retention and loyalty initiatives through digital engagement strategies.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Collaborate with Sales, Customer Engagement, Operations, and Management teams to support business growth objectives.
	Support digital visibility for sales campaigns, market activations, distributor engagement, and product awareness initiatives.
	Coordinate digital support for Company events, launches, promotions, and strategic projects.


The Ideal Candidate
Education:


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, Digital Media, or related field.
	Relevant certifications in Digital Marketing or Brand Strategy are an added advantage.


Experience:


	4–8years of relevant experience in Digital Marketing, Brand Marketing, Social Media Strategy, or related roles.
	Strong practical experience managing business digital platforms and executing measurable digital campaigns.
	Experience within FMCG, wellness, retail, or consumer-focused industries is an added advantage.


Technical & Creative Competence:


	Strong understanding of social media management, digital advertising, audience engagement, and content marketing.
	Knowledge of Meta Ads, Google Ads, analytics tools, SEO fundamentals, and campaign optimization.
	Strong content direction, storytelling, and creative execution capability.
	Ability to execute high-impact campaigns within lean or cost-conscious budgets.


Personal Attributes:


	Highly creative and commercially aware.
	Strong communication and organizational skills.
	Results-driven with strong attention to detail.
	Ability to work in fast-paced operational environments.
	Self-motivated, proactive, and execution-focused.


Salary
N650,000 - N800,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief portfolio or summary of past digital campaigns handled to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Senior Sales Executive&nbsp;

job Location: Lagos

	Contacting potential and existing customers.
	Setting sales goals and developing sales strategies.
	Research prospects and generating leads.
	Establish new business.
	Negotiate contracts and packages.
	Analyze risks and opportunities.
	Work towards monthly or annual targets.
	Set individual sales targets with the sales team.
	Track sales goals and reporting results as necessary.
	Promote the organization and products.
	Identify and understand the company&#39;s ideal customers and establish new business.
	Maintain accurate records.


Your Minimum Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in business or related field.
	4 to 5 years of cognate experience as a Senior Sales Executive or relevant role. Paint sales experience is essential.


Requirement &amp; Skills:


	Self-motivated with a results-driven approach.
	Passion for sales and resilience.
	Proficiency in English.
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office.
	Excellent customer service and sales skills.
	Meet planned sales goals.
	Strong understanding of marketing and negotiating techniques.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@meyerpaints.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Senior Sales Executive Job at Meyer Plc




        
    

        
        Meyer Plc is the Manufacturer and Marketer of high-quality Paints, including Architectural Paints, Wood Paints, Auto refinishes, Industrial and Marine, Road lining Paints, Roof coatings, Tube coatings, HP coatings, and Adhesives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Sales Executive 

job Location: Lagos

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Contacting potential and existing customers.
	Setting sales goals and developing sales strategies.
	Research prospects and generating leads.
	Establish new business.
	Negotiate contracts and packages.
	Analyze risks and opportunities.
	Work towards monthly or annual targets.
	Set individual sales targets with the sales team.
	Track sales goals and reporting results as necessary.
	Promote the organization and products.
	Identify and understand the company's ideal customers and establish new business.
	Maintain accurate records.


Your Minimum Qualifications


	Bachelor's degree in business or related field.
	4 to 5 years of cognate experience as a Senior Sales Executive or relevant role. Paint sales experience is essential.


Requirement & Skills:


	Self-motivated with a results-driven approach.
	Passion for sales and resilience.
	Proficiency in English.
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office.
	Excellent customer service and sales skills.
	Meet planned sales goals.
	Strong understanding of marketing and negotiating techniques.


Method of Application
